text: Imagine continents drifting apart like puzzle pieces... Alfred Wegener proposed this theory in the early 20th century, linking landmasses by their shapes. But why did it take decades for scientists to accept it? The answer lies beneath our feet. Plate tectonics introduced the concept of massive tectonic plates and their movements driven by Earth's heat. This theory explains earthquakes, volcanic activity, and the formation of mountains! Curious about more geological wonders? Hit follow to explore the mysteries of our planet!
